name: gtm-enrichment-deep
description: Deep GTM lead enrichment from an email (+ optional name). Apollo people enrichment is the primary source for person identity + LinkedIn, Hunter for company data, and Apollo organization enrichment is the routed fallback for funding. All steps are routed MPP via the SELAT Router.

email.description: Lead's email address, e.g. jane@acme.com. The domain is derived from this address.

domain.description: Company domain, e.g. acme.com. Derive from the email if not supplied.

firstName.description: Lead's first name, if known. Improves Apollo match rate.

lastName.description: Lead's last name, if known. Improves Apollo match rate.

company.description: Company name, if known. Improves Apollo match rate.

steps.label: enrich person — Apollo (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
enrich company — Hunter (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
fallback org enrich — Apollo (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router) — run only if Hunter returned no funding data
